{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lesser Karoshan system
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lesser Karoshan system]] is located next to the primary [[Karoshan]] system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lesser Karoshan system]] is a location where the [[Iron Legion]] was cleared.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
